The Problem

Beauty brands are bleeding
repeat revenue silently.

Your products are designed to run out. Your Shopify store isn't designed to care.

01
⏰
Generic automation ignores usage cycles
Standard Klaviyo flows send the same email to every customer on the same schedule — regardless of product volume, quantity purchased, or usage habits. A heavy serum user gets the same reminder as someone who barely touches their bottle.
→ Too early or too late, every time
02
📉
No early warning for churn
Founders have zero visibility into which customers are days away from running out and going silent. By the time a customer has churned, they've already found a competitor who caught them at the right moment.
→ Revenue lost silently, no alert
03
🛒
Checkout friction kills repurchase intent
Even with perfect timing, a 4-step checkout process with discount code entry loses 70%+ of customers who clicked. Repurchase intent fades in seconds when friction appears. One-click checkout is not optional.
→ High cart abandonment on refills
04
📱
No SMS fallback for at-risk customers
Customers who haven't repurchased 5 days after their product runs out are your highest-churn risk. Email alone isn't enough. Without SMS, you're relying on hope rather than a systematic re-engagement system.
→ At-risk customers lost to competitors
How It Works

Five steps from store connect
to revenue recovered.

01
Shopify Connect
Connect your Shopify store via OAuth. Orders sync via webhook in under 30 seconds. No CSV required — though a CSV upload path also exists for an instant Retention Audit with zero integration.
02
ML Calculates Depletion
The Refill Brain maps each product to its category daily usage rate. Serum: 1.0ml/day. Moisturiser: 2.0ml/day. Combined with purchase quantity, it calculates an exact predicted run-out date per customer per product.
03
Risk Scoring
Every customer receives a daily risk tier: Healthy (>14 days), Due This Month (8–14 days), Due This Week (1–7 days), or Overdue (<0 days). Your dashboard shows who needs attention today.
04
3-Step Nudge Sequence
Day −5 educational email → Day 0 refill email with Magic Link + 10% discount → Day +5 SMS alert for opted-in customers. Smart suppression prevents over-messaging.
05
Revenue Recovered
Customer taps the Magic Link, pays in one tap. Shopify webhook fires. Dashboard updates in real time. The churn model self-updates via online learning — no manual retraining needed.
app.retainai.com/customer-health
The ML Engine

No Klaviyo flow can do this.

The Refill Brain is a four-model intelligence engine trained on real Sephora data — 8,494 products, 602,130 reviews — using online learning to improve automatically with every real customer order. No manual retraining, ever.

After a customer's second purchase of the same product, the engine calculates their actual daily usage rate from the real gap between orders. The learned rate replaces the category default — classified as Heavy, Normal, or Light user. Confidence increases with every additional purchase cycle.

8,494
Sephora products in training data
602K
Customer reviews analysed
33/33
ML tests passing — 100%
SGD Regressor
Depletion Model
Predicts daily usage rate per product. Triggered on every new Shopify order. Continuously improves via partial_fit().
depletion_model.pkl · Live
SGD Classifier
Usage Classifier
Classifies each customer as Heavy / Normal / Light user from their second purchase onward. Adjusts reminder timing per segment.
usage_model.pkl · Live
Bayesian Ridge
Seasonal Model
Predicts seasonal demand multipliers per product category and month. Moisturiser spikes in winter. SPF in summer. Auto-adjusts run-out dates.
seasonal_model.pkl · Live
SGD Classifier
Churn Scorer
Outputs a churn risk score 0–100 per customer. Updates the health map in real time when a nudge result is known.
churn_model.pkl · Live
The 3-Step Nudge

The right message, at
exactly the right moment.

D−5
Day −5 · Email via SendGrid
The Educational Warm-Up
5 days before run-out, we send an educational email — tips for getting the last drops from their product. Pure value. No hard sell. This primes the customer to trust the brand before the ask comes.
D 0
Day 0 · Email + Magic Link
The Refill Moment
On the predicted run-out date, the Magic Link fires — a Shopify Cart Permalink that opens checkout with the product pre-filled and a unique 10% discount auto-applied. One tap to pay. No search, no cart, no code entry.
D+5
Day +5 · SMS via Twilio
The Urgency Catch
For SMS opted-in customers who still haven't repurchased 5 days post run-out, we send a direct SMS. Catches the highest-risk segment before they find a competitor. Only fires if Day 0 had no conversion.

FAQ

Questions
beauty brands
always ask.

Can't find what you're looking for? Book a 20-minute demo and we'll walk through your specific store setup live.

Book a demo →
Does RetainAI work with my existing Klaviyo setup?+
Yes — RetainAI sends emails via SendGrid using your brand's domain, completely independent of Klaviyo. You can run both simultaneously. RetainAI handles refill reminders; Klaviyo handles everything else. No conflicts, no migrations required.
What if my products aren't in your training dataset?+
Every product is automatically mapped to one of 35+ categories at onboarding. The category daily usage rate serves as the default until the customer places a second order — at which point the ML engine learns their actual usage rate and overwrites the default. Your products don't need to be in Sephora's catalogue.
How long does setup take?+
Under 5 minutes. Connect your Shopify store via OAuth, review your auto-detected product categories, activate your nudge sequence, and go live. Webhooks sync your orders in real time from that moment forward. The first nudges can fire within 24 hours of connecting.
Will customers get too many emails?+
No. RetainAI has a built-in frequency cap (1 nudge per customer per 30 days), quiet hours (10PM–8AM), and VIP suppression lists for customers you don't want touched. Customers who have already repurchased are automatically removed from the sequence the moment Shopify fires the order webhook.
How does the Magic Link discount work?+
When a nudge fires, RetainAI generates a unique Shopify discount code per customer (you set the percentage — default 10%) and embeds it directly into a Shopify Cart Permalink. When the customer taps the link, they land on a pre-filled checkout with the discount already applied. No code entry. No coupon hunting.
Is customer data safe? Who can see it?+
Customer data is stored in a dedicated Supabase (PostgreSQL) instance with row-level security. Your data is isolated from all other merchants. We never share, sell, or use your customer data for training shared models. ML models train only on product metadata — not individual customer records.
